_comment: REV-05 + D-10 load-bearing fixture. Only 8 SCORED cycles in the trailing-30 window → confidence.tier='insufficient' (D-13: < 10 SCORED days). The service returns the typed positive output per ADR-0004: anomalies=[], actions=[], patterns=[] (D-07), AND insufficient_reason !== null — ALL FOUR conditions hold atomically. Today (2026-03-15) is one of the 8 SCORED days so today_state is populated; the orchestrator declines to compute anomalies regardless.
name: daily-insufficient-days
